description: Composition Navy blue shorts made of 100% polyester, has a broad elasticated waistband, two insert pocket on the sides, adidas 3-Stripe running down the sides and an embroidered branding on the left thigh above the hem Fit Regular Wash care only hand wash gently Do not machine wash or use fabric softener Wash with like colours Wash and iron inside out Do not iron on motif/print/trims/logo Progressive casual wear meets sporty style in these shorts from adidas. This piece nails the minimalistic mood that is trending currently. Work this Sports/casual aesthetic with a monochrome tee and sport shoes. For a more casual vibe, style this with a T-shirt, jacket and casual shoes. Model Statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
